title: [n8n] Human Approval via Slack Before Agent Takes Action
description: Build an n8n workflow that pauses before an irreversible action, sends a Slack approval request, and only proceeds when a human approves.

steps.title: Design the workflow with a pause point
steps.instruction: Create an n8n workflow that includes a pause point before a critical action (e.g., sending an email, posting to social media, making a payment).
steps.prompt: How do I add a Wait node in n8n that pauses execution until it receives an external webhook response?
steps.expected_result: n8n workflow with a Wait node configured to pause and wait for a webhook callback
steps.tip: The Wait node in n8n supports a 'On webhook call' mode — this is the key to human-in-the-loop

steps.title: Send Slack approval request
steps.instruction: Before the Wait node, add a Slack node that sends a message with Approve/Reject action buttons.
steps.prompt:
Send a Slack message to #approvals channel with this format:

*Approval Required*
Action: [describe the action the agent wants to take]
Details: [key details]

[Approve] [Reject]
steps.expected_result: A Slack message appears with interactive Approve and Reject buttons
steps.tip: Use Slack's Block Kit to create interactive buttons — n8n's Slack node supports Block Kit JSON directly

steps.title: Handle approval and rejection
steps.instruction: Connect the webhook response to an IF node that routes to the appropriate action based on the approval decision.
steps.prompt: How do I add an IF node after the Wait node to check if the approval was 'approved' or 'rejected' and route the workflow accordingly?
steps.expected_result: Workflow proceeds with the action if approved, or sends a cancellation notification if rejected
steps.tip: Always send a confirmation Slack message after both approval and rejection so the approver knows the workflow responded

challenge: Extend this pattern to a multi-level approval flow: first-level approver gets 30 minutes, then automatically escalates to a second approver if no response.

videos.title: n8n Human in the Loop Slack Approval Tutorial
videos.search_keyword: n8n human in the loop Slack approval workflow 2026

practicePrompts.label: Create Approval Workflow
practicePrompts.instruction: Build a basic n8n workflow for human approval.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that sends a Slack message asking for approval before proceeding with an irreversible action.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a timeout feature to the approval request.

practicePrompts.label: Integrate Slack Notifications
practicePrompts.instruction: Add Slack notifications to your workflow.
practicePrompts.prompt: Modify your n8n workflow to send a Slack notification when the action is approved by a human.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with customizing the Slack message format.

practicePrompts.label: Handle Rejections
practicePrompts.instruction: Implement rejection handling in your workflow.
practicePrompts.prompt: Update your n8n workflow to take a different action if the Slack approval is rejected.
practicePrompts.followUp: Explore adding logging features for approval outcomes.
